properties.injury_desc:
RFL amputated with exposed devitalised bone
LFL fishing line constriction to bone with necrosis and oedemna of flipper

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Barnacle burden on carapace. Pinkish algae on carapace.

properties.injury_desc: Fracture line in carapace - but not indicative of boat strike

properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Lifeguard was directed to swim out with hatchling out offshore to release by rangers from Mon repos, as it was struggling to swim out with waves on shore

properties.injury_desc: Hooked on SCP drumline hook.  Hook went through hammer (not mouth). No photos available as they submit photos through to Fisheries via an app and once submitted, they are gone.
properties.cause_of_stranding: Hooked/Entangled in Shark Control Program Drumline

properties.injury_desc: Shark bite to neck from below.
RF, genitals and tail fluke. Likely scavenging.
